corrected_assertion: Figure F5 is renamed to F5-amendment-view.png as part of the EBR terminology unification. The TikZ source and the PNG export are both renamed. All \includegraphics references in paper/lncs/main.tex are updated to F5-amendment-view.png. The figure content (the diagram itself) is unchanged — only the filename and the figure caption text are updated to reflect the new vocabulary.
